register.logoAlt: Intraocular Lens Specialist Dr. ICL Eye Clinic
register.privacyText1: Dr. ICL Ophthalmology (hereinafter referred to as 'the Company') values your personal information and complies with the "Act on Promotion of Information and Communication Network Utilization and Information Protection."
register.privacyText2: The Company informs you of the purposes and methods of using the personal information you provide, as well as the measures taken to protect your personal information through this Privacy Policy.
register.privacyText3: If the Company revises the Privacy Policy, it will notify you through the website notice (or individual notice).
register.privacyAgree: I have read the privacy policy and agree to it.
register.successDesc: Explore the various services of Dr. ICL Eye Clinic.
register.alertAgree: Please agree to the Privacy Policy.
register.alertId: Username must be at least 5 characters.
register.alertPw: Password must be at least 8 characters.
